assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check version compatibility and advises checking Istio release notes for supported K8s versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Verify Istio 1.30 supports GKE 1.30' and 'Check Istio release notes for supported K8s versions' in the pre-upgrade planning

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response follows the correct upgrade order by upgrading GKE control plane first, then Istio, demonstrating awareness of version compatibility requirements

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response mentions sidecar injection and restarting deployments but doesn't specifically explain the mutating webhook mechanism or potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to verify sidecar versions after restart and mentions checking sidecar injection in the validation checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes continuous monitoring script with 'istioctl proxy-status' and commands to verify sidecar versions across namespaces

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple istioctl commands like 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy images

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions version checking and gradual migration, it doesn't explicitly warn about traffic disruption risks from version mismatches between control plane and sidecars
